boundary_binding.action_boundary: May finance book, release, defer, capitalize, consolidate, or recognize the requested accounting action now? Focus: lease expense classification with unsigned accounting memo.

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact action boundary. The controlling control record (SRC-4381B93C9BA5-CTL) shows the lease memo, term, and classification criteria match is missing, mismatched, or not yet closed. The policy requires closure before execution. Escalate rather than book, release, defer, capitalize, consolidate, or recognize now.
